originalTitle: 'Hungry' Watkins is man on mission but will Tuchel take notice?
title: Ollie the Super Scorer!
content:
Hello, My Friends!

Hi everyone! It's your friendly reporter here, bringing you super exciting news from the world of football! We love football, don't we? It's so much fun to watch players run and kick the ball. Today, we're going to talk about a very special player. His name is Ollie Watkins!

Meet Ollie Watkins!

Ollie Watkins is a famous football player. He plays for a big team called Aston Villa. Ollie loves football more than anything! He loves to run fast. He loves to kick the ball. But most of all, he loves to score goals! Scoring goals is what makes football games so exciting!

A Little Sad News

Sometimes, even super players like Ollie have a little sad news. Not long ago, the coaches for the England team were choosing players. This is like when your teacher chooses kids for a special team. But guess what? Ollie was not chosen this time. It means he couldn't play for his country, England. That must have made him feel a little sad.

Ollie's Brave Heart

But Ollie Watkins is a very brave player! He didn't give up. Instead, he thought, "I will work even harder!" He wanted to show everyone that he is a super good player. He wanted to show he can score many, many goals. His heart was "hungry" to play and show his best!

First Super Goal!

So, Ollie went back to play for his team, Aston Villa. And guess what he did? He played a game against another team called West Ham. And in that game, Ollie scored a goal! It was a super goal! Everyone cheered and cheered. His team was so happy! **Did You Know?** A goal is when the football goes into the big net! This makes a point for the team.

Two More Amazing Goals!

But Ollie didn't stop there! He played another game. This time, his team played against a team called Bologna. And in this game, Ollie was extra special! He scored not just one goal, but TWO goals! Can you imagine? Two goals in one game! That is super amazing!

Why are Goals So Important?

When a player scores a goal, it helps his team win. The team with the most goals at the end of the game wins! So, Ollie's goals were very, very important. They helped his team play well. They showed how strong and fast he is. **Did You Know?** Football is also called soccer in some places like America! But in Africa and many other places, we call it football!

Did You Know? About Football!

Let's learn some fun things about football! **Did You Know?** There are 11 players on a football team when they play a match! They all work together. **Did You Know?** The person who stands in front of the net to stop the ball is called the goalkeeper! They are very important. **Did You Know?** Football games are usually 90 minutes long! That's a long time to run and kick! **Did You Know?** A coach is a person who helps the players learn and get better. They tell the players what to do.

Showing Everyone His Best!

Ollie scoring these goals was his way of saying, "Look at me! I am good!" He was showing all the important people, like the coaches, that he deserves to play. He worked very hard in his games. He ran very fast. He kicked the ball very well. He did his very, very best!

Will They See Ollie?

Now, many people are watching Ollie. Important coaches and team managers are seeing him play. They are seeing his amazing goals. They are seeing how much he wants to win. We hope they will notice how wonderfully he is playing! We hope they will give him another chance to play for his country, England! **Did You Know?** Many children in Africa love to play football! They play with friends in the streets and fields. Maybe one day, you could be a famous football player too!

What Can We Learn from Ollie?

Ollie Watkins teaches us a very important lesson. When something makes you sad, or when you don't get chosen, don't give up! Work harder! Try your best! Show everyone what you can do. Just like Ollie showed everyone his amazing goal-scoring skills! If you work hard, good things can happen. Maybe you want to be good at drawing. Or good at reading. Or good at helping your family. Whatever it is, just keep trying and never give up!

Keep Playing, Ollie!

We are so proud of Ollie Watkins! He is a true football hero. He showed great spirit and skill. We wish him all the best for his next games. Keep scoring those super goals, Ollie! We are all cheering for you!

Our African Football Dream!

And to all my friends out there in Africa, keep kicking that ball! Keep dreaming big! Maybe one day, a famous reporter will be talking about your amazing goals too! Football is for everyone. It brings joy and happiness to so many hearts.
summary: Ollie Watkins, a football player, felt sad when he wasn't chosen for his country's team, but he worked extra hard and scored three amazing goals to show everyone how good he is.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows us that even when things are tough or you feel sad, working hard and never giving up can help you show your best and achieve great things, just like Ollie did in football.
